task4_partial_status.note: A reply-draft external workbench candidate exists, but it does not send platform replies.

notes: This cockpit only aggregates the currently shipped management summary, minimal diagnostic, and comparison layers.
Comparison outputs and order formal_summary / product_contribution / trend_signal remain derived outputs.
Unavailable dimensions stay explicitly visible and are not presented as covered capabilities.

next_best_actions.recommended_next_action: Fill required category attributes, schema-required fields, and media candidates before handing the draft package to manual review. Do not enter platform publish.

task3_summary.recommended_next_action: Fill required category attributes, schema-required fields, and media candidates before handing the draft package to manual review. Do not enter platform publish.

current_reply_profiles.label: Minimal handoff
current_reply_profiles.note: Use when only the inquiry text or very limited context is available for an external draft.

current_reply_profiles.label: Quote confirmation draft
current_reply_profiles.note: Use when product and customer context already exist, but quote and lead time still need human confirmation.

current_reply_profiles.label: Mockup customization draft
current_reply_profiles.note: Use when the reply depends on mockup, logo, or customization follow-up material.

current_order_profiles.label: Minimal order handoff
current_order_profiles.note: Use when only the basic buyer data and a small amount of line-item context are available for an external order draft.

current_order_profiles.label: Quote confirmation order draft
current_order_profiles.note: Use when line items are available, but price, total amount, and lead time still need human confirmation.

current_order_profiles.label: Commercial review order draft
current_order_profiles.note: Use when the main commercial fields are present, but manual review is still required before any downstream handoff.

next_best_actions.recommended_next_action: Fill required category attributes, schema-required fields, and media candidates before handing the draft package to manual review. Do not enter platform publish.
next_best_actions.reason: Task 3 still stays at safe draft preparation and manual field completion.

field_descriptions.date: 导出日期，系统会标准化到 YYYY-MM-DD。
field_descriptions.campaign_name: 计划名称；campaign_name 与 campaign_id 至少需要一个。
field_descriptions.campaign_id: 计划 ID；campaign_name 与 campaign_id 至少需要一个。
field_descriptions.ad_group_name: 单元名称，建议尽量提供。
field_descriptions.ad_group_id: 单元 ID，建议尽量提供。
field_descriptions.keyword: 关键词级输入；没有关键词维度时可留空。
field_descriptions.inquiries: 询盘量，若缺失会降低建议强度。
field_descriptions.ctr: 点击率；缺失时按 clicks / impressions 保守计算。
field_descriptions.cpc: 单次点击成本；缺失时按 spend / clicks 保守计算。
field_descriptions.conversion: 可得的转化率字段；当前不强制。
field_descriptions.inquiry_rate: 询盘率；缺失时按 inquiries / clicks 保守计算。
field_descriptions.region: 地域维度，若导出可得建议提供。
field_descriptions.device: 设备维度，若导出可得建议提供。
field_descriptions.source_file: 原始来源文件名或来源标记，用于追溯。

diagnostic_findings.message: 存在高点击低询盘关键词，建议先降本或暂停低效率词。
当前花费集中在少数计划，建议逐个核查其点击质量与询盘承接。
当前广告总体变化方向为 improving。

recommendations.action: 对高询盘率关键词做扩量观察，必要时单独拆组。
recommendations.basis: 已识别出可复用的高询盘关键词。

recommendations.action: 对高成本关键词做降价、暂停或转内容整改。
recommendations.basis: 存在成本偏高的关键词。

prioritized_actions.action: 对高询盘率关键词做扩量观察，必要时单独拆组。
prioritized_actions.basis: 已识别出可复用的高询盘关键词。

prioritized_actions.action: 对高成本关键词做降价、暂停或转内容整改。
prioritized_actions.basis: 存在成本偏高的关键词。
